calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Cindy Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Sur Miao Tung.
King Hsiao, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Mario Perez, whose default was entered on February 4, 2009.
Notice of Stay of Proceedings as to defendant Jnana Bright, sued as Jnana Sanchez, was filed on March 2, 2009.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 6, 2009.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Residential Lease-Rental Agreement
and Deposit Receipts dated 03/22/96--------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or
Surrender Possession dated 01/03/09--------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Declaration of Service of Notice to Tenant dated 01/06/09----------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Sur Miao Tung, and against defendant Mario Perez (only) as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,169.26.
Holdover Damages - $1,183.58.
Attorney's Fees - $2,000.00.
Costs - $545.00.
Total - $4,897.84.

Additionally, plaintiff Sur Miao Tung is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 241 Brighton Street, #3, San Francisco, CA 94122, as to defendant Mario Perez, only. The lease agreement is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cindy Lee, Esq., appeared with King Hsiao on behalf of plaintiff Sur Miao Tung. Limited Scope attorney Mark Hitchcock, Esq., appeared for and with defendant Jnana Bright.

Settlement Conference Held. Parties did not return prior to 5:00 p.m. Trial Remains on calendar.

Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)
